name: auto-pay
description: Executes automatic payments in the spirit of Pharos's x402 protocol: checks balance, (ERC-20) approves the escrow, deposits the amount and retries with backoff on transient failure. Supports native PHRS and USDC.

inputs.tokenAddress: string (optional) — ERC-20 token address (USDC); ignored in native mode
inputs.jobs: array of { debtIndex, signer, amountWei, fromName } — payments to execute
inputs.maxRetries: number (optional) — max attempts per payment, default 3
inputs.native: boolean (optional) — true to pay in native PHRS

outputs.results: array — per-payment result (success, txHash, attempts, error)
outputs.allPaid: boolean — true if all payments were confirmed
